body_txt: A classic gag. Alice tells Bob some news, which he interprets in a wrong (and hilarious) way. She tries to explain and correct his mistake, but he applies his misinterpretation to the explanation as well. Bob is usually portrayed to be somewhat dim-witted, but a variant of this trope has him do it on purpose, just to screw with Alice or as a form of Obfuscating Stupidity . Sometimes done with Ambiguous Syntax . Related to One Side of the Story , Boke and Tsukkomi Routine , Chain of Corrections , Comically Missing the Point , Theory Tunnelvision , They Just Don't Get It and Who's on First? . Compare One Dialogue, Two Conversations , where everybody is misunderstanding the point. Super-Trope to Misconstrued Pedestal .
